details.predicted_answer:
Based on the information provided, the Sord M5 was more widely distributed geographically compared to the Interact Home Computer. The Sord M5 was sold in Japan, the United Kingdom, Czechoslovakia, South Korea, and even had localized versions in several other countries. On the other hand, the Interact Home Computer was only sold in a limited number of locations, primarily in the United States and possibly some areas in Canada and Mexico. Therefore, the Sord M5 spanned farther distances regarding sales.
finish(answer="The Sord M5 spanned farther distances regarding sales compared to the Interact Home Computer.")
